states.name: IdleOff_LevelUndefined
states.description: No level transition in progress, associated OnOff is false, current level is undefined (null).

states.name: IdleOff_LevelDefined
states.description: No level transition in progress, associated OnOff is false, current level defined within [MinLevel, MaxLevel].

states.name: IdleOn
states.description: No level transition in progress, associated OnOff is true, current level defined within [MinLevel, MaxLevel].

states.name: MovingByMoveToLevel
states.description: A MoveToLevel or MoveToLevelWithOnOff command is in progress with a finite transition time; RemainingTime > 0.

states.name: MovingByMove
states.description: A Move or MoveWithOnOff command is in progress, RemainingTime is not used; movement continues until stopped or limits reached.

states.name: MovingByStep
states.description: A Step or StepWithOnOff command is in progress with a finite transition time; RemainingTime > 0.

transitions.guard_condition: ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == false && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Command ignored for level and on/off when ExecuteIfOff is 0 and OnOff is false.

transitions.guard_condition: ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && TransitionTime != null && TransitionTime > 0
transitions.timing_requirements: Movement time equals derived duration from TransitionTime; device may ignore if variable rate unsupported.

transitions.guard_condition: ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0)
transitions.timing_requirements: Transition considered immediate when TransitionTime is null or zero or when timing is ignored.

transitions.guard_condition: ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == false && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: No change to CurrentLevel or OnOff when ExecuteIfOff is 0 and OnOff is false.

transitions.guard_condition: ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && TransitionTime != null && TransitionTime > 0
transitions.timing_requirements: Movement time equals derived duration from TransitionTime; device may ignore if variable rate unsupported.

transitions.guard_condition: ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0)
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate level change when duration is not provided or is zero.
Movement time equals derived duration; may be ignored if variable rate unsupported.
Immediate level change when duration is not provided or is zero.
Command is rejected at the application level; no state change modeled.

transitions.guard_condition: Rate != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == false && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: With ExecuteIfOff 0 and OnOff false, Move has no effect when level is undefined.

transitions.guard_condition: Rate != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Continuous movement at computed effective rate until stopped or limits reached.

transitions.guard_condition: Rate != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == false && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: No change to level or OnOff when ExecuteIfOff is 0 and OnOff is false.

transitions.guard_condition: Rate != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Continuous movement at effective rate; CurrentLevel moves toward device limits.
Continuous movement while OnOff is true; stops at device min or max.
Command is rejected; no state change modeled.
Command is rejected; no state change modeled.
Command is rejected; no state change modeled.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == false && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: No effect when ExecuteIfOff is 0 and OnOff is false and level is undefined.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0)
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate step when duration is not provided or zero.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && TransitionTime != null && TransitionTime > 0
transitions.timing_requirements: Step movement over TransitionTime scaled to actual delta.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == false && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: No level change when ExecuteIfOff is 0 and OnOff is false.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0)
actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate step when duration not present or zero.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && ExecuteIfOff(build_temp_options(Options, OptionsMask, OptionsOverride)) == true && OnOff == false && TransitionTime != null && TransitionTime > 0
actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: Step movement over TransitionTime scaled to actual delta.

actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate step when duration not present or zero.

actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: Step movement over TransitionTime scaled to actual delta.
When device is off, MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns it on for target above min and moves to target level.

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && clamp_level(Level, MinLevel, MaxLevel) > MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate change from off to on with level set above minimum.

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && clamp_level(Level, MinLevel, MaxLevel) == MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate level change to minimum while remaining off.
From off with defined level, MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns on if target above min and moves to target.

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && clamp_level(Level, MinLevel, MaxLevel) > MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate transition from off to on with target level above minimum.

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && clamp_level(Level, MinLevel, MaxLevel) == MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate set to minimum level while staying off.
When device is on, MoveToLevelWithOnOff sets level to target over time and keeps device logically on or off according to target.

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == true && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && clamp_level(Level, MinLevel, MaxLevel) > MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate level change while keeping device on.

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == true && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && clamp_level(Level, MinLevel, MaxLevel) == MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Immediate transition to minimum level and off when target equals minimum.
Command invalid; no state change modeled.
Command invalid; no state change modeled.
Command invalid; no state change modeled.
From off, MoveWithOnOff up turns device on and moves toward max level.
From off and undefined level, MoveWithOnOff down begins continuous movement toward minimum while device remains off until min is reached.
Per state table: MoveWithOnOff up from off raises level to max and turns device on.
From off with defined level, MoveWithOnOff down moves level toward minimum while keeping device off.
When on, MoveWithOnOff up raises level to maximum and keeps device on.
When on, MoveWithOnOff down drives level toward min and turns off when minimum is reached.
Command invalid; no effect.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Up && compute_step_target_from_undefined(StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel) > MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: From off and undefined level, immediate StepWithOnOff up that ends above min defines level and turns device on.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Up && compute_step_target_from_undefined(StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel) == MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: From off and undefined level, immediate StepWithOnOff up that lands at min defines level but keeps device off.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Down
transitions.timing_requirements: From off and undefined level, immediate StepWithOnOff down defines a minimum or near-minimum level while device remains off.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && OnOff == false && TransitionTime != null && TransitionTime > 0
transitions.timing_requirements: From off and undefined level, timed StepWithOnOff moves toward computed final level; OnOff will be updated at completion based on final level.
Command invalid; no effect.
Command invalid; no effect.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Up && compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel) > MinLevel
actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: From off, StepWithOnOff up that ends above min turns device on.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && OnOff == false && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Down
transitions.timing_requirements: From off, StepWithOnOff down sets level to min and keeps device off.

actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: From on, StepWithOnOff up adjusts level and keeps device on.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Down && compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel) == MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: From on, StepWithOnOff down that lands at min turns device off.

transitions.guard_condition: StepSize != 0 && (TransitionTime == null || TransitionTime == 0) && StepMode == Down && compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel) > MinLevel
actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: From on, StepWithOnOff down that does not reach min keeps device on.

actions: EffectiveTargetLevel := compute_step_target(CurrentLevel, StepMode, StepSize, MinLevel, MaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: From on, StepWithOnOff over time adjusts level and may toggle OnOff at completion depending on final level.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == MoveToLevel && RemainingTime == 1 && TargetLevelForOngoingMoveToLevel > MinLevel && OnOff == true
transitions.timing_requirements: Completion of a plain MoveToLevel to above-min level while device is on.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == MoveToLevel && RemainingTime == 1 && TargetLevelForOngoingMoveToLevel > MinLevel && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Completion of plain MoveToLevel while device is logically off (ExecuteIfOff case).
On completion of MoveToLevelWithOnOff above minimum, device is turned on.
Completion of MoveToLevelWithOnOff to minimum turns device off.
Periodic decrement of RemainingTime and level interpolation at 0.1s units.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == Step && RemainingTime == 1 && FinalStepLevel > MinLevel && OnOff == true
transitions.timing_requirements: Completion of base step with final level above min while device is on.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == Step && RemainingTime == 1 && FinalStepLevel >= MinLevel && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Completion of base step while device is logically off (ExecuteIfOff case).
Completion of StepWithOnOff above minimum leaves or forces device on.
Completion of StepWithOnOff with final level at min turns device off.
Intermediate interpolation for timed step.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == Move && MoveDirection == Up && CurrentLevel == MaxLevel && OnOff == true
transitions.timing_requirements: Continuous move up stops automatically at max level while device is on.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == Move && MoveDirection == Up && CurrentLevel == MaxLevel && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Continuous move up in ExecuteIfOff-off case stops at max with device logically off.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == MoveWithOnOff && MoveDirection == Up && CurrentLevel == MaxLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: MoveWithOnOff up reaching max remains on.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == Move && MoveDirection == Down && CurrentLevel == MinLevel && OnOff == true
transitions.timing_requirements: Base Move down reaching min leaves device on per lighting table.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == Move && MoveDirection == Down && CurrentLevel == MinLevel && OnOff == false
transitions.timing_requirements: Base Move down in ExecuteIfOff-off case reaches min while device remains logically off.

transitions.guard_condition: ActiveCommandType == MoveWithOnOff && MoveDirection == Down && CurrentLevel == MinLevel
transitions.timing_requirements: Continuous MoveWithOnOff down that reaches min turns device off.
Stop immediately terminates ongoing move; CurrentLevel remains at its in-transition value, device stays logically on.
Stop terminates ongoing move when device is logically off.
Stop halts MoveToLevel or MoveToLevelWithOnOff transitions when device is on.
Stop halts MoveToLevel or MoveToLevelWithOnOff transitions when device is off.
Stop halts Step or StepWithOnOff transitions when device is on; level is frozen.
Stop halts Step or StepWithOnOff transitions when device is off.
StopWithOnOff identical to Stop; halts continuous movement while preserving OnOff state.
StopWithOnOff identical to Stop when device is off.
StopWithOnOff halts MoveToLevel and MoveToLevelWithOnOff when device is on.
StopWithOnOff halts MoveToLevel and MoveToLevelWithOnOff when device is off.
StopWithOnOff halts Step and StepWithOnOff transitions when device is on.
StopWithOnOff halts Step and StepWithOnOff transitions when device is off.
Command unsupported when Frequency feature not present.
Command unsupported when Frequency feature not present.
Command unsupported when Frequency feature not present.
CurrentFrequency updated immediately to closest supported value.
Constraint error at application level; no attribute change modeled.

scene_behaviors: When a scene is stored, scene-capable Level Control attributes CurrentLevel and CurrentFrequency are captured in the scene table extension field set for this endpoint.

When a scene is recalled, stored values of CurrentLevel and CurrentFrequency are applied to the Level Control cluster, subject to supported features; attributes not supported per FeatureMap are ignored even if present in the scene table.

definitions.definition: A logical value derived from the effective Options bitmap indicating whether base level commands without OnOff coupling are allowed to modify level-related attributes when the associated OnOff attribute is false.
definitions.usage_context: Used in guard conditions for MoveToLevel, Move and Step when OnOff is false to decide if commands operate while the device is logically off.

definitions.definition: A logical condition that holds when the Frequency feature bit (FQ) is set in the FeatureMap attribute for the Level Control cluster.
definitions.usage_context: Used in MoveToClosestFrequency guards to restrict its use to devices that support frequency control.

definitions.definition: A conceptual operation that combines the persistent Options attribute with the OptionsMask and OptionsOverride fields of a command to obtain the temporary options bitmap used for that command.
definitions.usage_context: Used to derive effective option bits such as ExecuteIfOff and CoupleColorTempToLevel at command reception; modeled implicitly inside guards via ExecuteIfOff(...).

definitions.definition: An abstract operation that determines the effective rate of level change using the Rate command field if present and non-null, otherwise using DefaultMoveRate if available and non-null, otherwise a device-specific maximum rate.
definitions.usage_context: Referenced in Move and MoveWithOnOff transitions to choose the speed of continuous movement.

definitions.definition: An abstract operation that ensures a target level lies within the inclusive range defined by MinLevel and MaxLevel attributes.
definitions.usage_context: Used in MoveToLevel and MoveToLevelWithOnOff transitions to derive the EffectiveTargetLevel.

definitions.definition: An abstract operation that calculates the resulting level after applying an upward or downward step of a given magnitude to a known CurrentLevel, constraining the result within the valid level range between MinLevel and MaxLevel.
definitions.usage_context: Used in Step and StepWithOnOff transitions when CurrentLevel is already defined.

definitions.definition: An abstract operation that determines a concrete destination level when a step is requested while the current level is undefined, using device policy to map the undefined state to a starting point and then applying the requested step within [MinLevel, MaxLevel].
definitions.usage_context: Used for Step and StepWithOnOff transitions that originate from IdleOff_LevelUndefined.

definitions.definition: A conceptual mapping from the TransitionTime field or related attributes into a RemainingTime value measured in tenths of a second, possibly treating very short transitions as effectively immediate.
definitions.usage_context: Used in MoveToLevel and MoveToLevelWithOnOff transitions with non-zero transition duration.

definitions.definition: A conceptual mapping that converts the command TransitionTime and requested StepSize into a RemainingTime value, and may scale the duration when the actual permitted level delta is smaller than the requested step.
definitions.usage_context: Used in Step and StepWithOnOff transitions with non-zero transition duration.

definitions.definition: An abstract function that provides an intermediate level value during a MoveToLevel-style transition, based on the current level, the target level and the current RemainingTime.
definitions.usage_context: Used in timer_tick transitions while in MovingByMoveToLevel state to model gradual change of CurrentLevel.

definitions.definition: An abstract function that provides an intermediate level for a timed step based on the final step level and RemainingTime.
definitions.usage_context: Used in timer_tick transitions while in MovingByStep state.

definitions.definition: A conceptual variable holding the final desired level during a multi-tick MoveToLevel or MoveToLevelWithOnOff transition.
definitions.usage_context: Referenced in MovingByMoveToLevel invariants and timer_tick transitions to interpolate and complete transitions.

definitions.definition: A conceptual variable that stores the intended final level of a running Step or StepWithOnOff transition.
definitions.usage_context: Used in timer_tick transitions for MovingByStep to know the endpoint of the step.

definitions.definition: A conceptual representation of the direction of level change during Move or MoveWithOnOff, corresponding to the MoveModeEnum values Up or Down.
definitions.usage_context: Used in MovingByMove transitions and level_limit_reached guards to decide which device limit has been reached.

definitions.definition: An abstract operation that selects an initial CurrentLevel value when continuous movement begins and the previous level was undefined, using device-specific policy while keeping the level inside the valid range.
definitions.usage_context: Used in Move and MoveWithOnOff transitions originating from IdleOff_LevelUndefined to ensure the invariants of moving states are satisfied.

definitions.definition: An abstract function that, given a requested frequency, returns the nearest generatable frequency value supported by the device or a special null indication when no acceptable approximation exists.
definitions.usage_context: Used in MoveToClosestFrequency transitions to decide whether to update CurrentFrequency or to conceptually return a constraint error.

definitions.definition: A conceptual variable that records the type of level-changing command currently in progress, or None when no transition is active.
definitions.usage_context: Used in state invariants and timer-driven transitions to interpret RemainingTime and determine which behavior and on/off linkage applies.

definitions.definition: A conceptual mapping from the MoveModeEnum value in a Move or MoveWithOnOff command into the internal MoveDirection representation (Up or Down).
definitions.usage_context: Used when entering the MovingByMove state to record the movement direction.

references.name: On/Off Cluster
references.description: Provides the OnOff attribute and related semantics that interact with Level Control through the OnOff feature and 'WithOnOff' command variants.

references.name: Color Control Cluster
references.description: Optionally linked via the CoupleColorTempToLevel option bit to coordinate color temperature changes with level changes.

references.name: Scenes Management server cluster
references.description: Stores and recalls Level Control scene-capable attributes CurrentLevel and CurrentFrequency in scene tables for endpoints that implement both clusters.

references.name: FeatureMap
references.description: Determines which Level Control features (OnOff, Lighting, Frequency) are enabled, influencing command semantics and availability.

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Indicates the implemented revision of the Level Control cluster, which determines the precise behavioral clarifications that apply.
